title: StupiClient
description:
The offical StupiClient, the ultimate performance boost for Minecraft.
↪Performance boost FPS++    
↪Optifine-features
↪Buildingtools
body:
![StupiClient](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8001f7a20623b604199c35be890b2da93256b234.jpeg)

is a Modpack for everyone who wants to have the best possible performance in Minecraft. It was mainly intended for the "StupiCraft" my own SMP-Server where I play with my friends. But they wanted me to upload "StupiClient" because they really liked it and so I did.

The modpack is recommended for everyone, who wants to have a nice experience in Minecraft. You will get some features like shaders and zoom. Redstone will be much easier because of veryiose tweaks. You can sort chests and everything with only one click.

One of the big advantages of the Modpack is that it is fram a small developer and receives a  lot of love. 

<details>
<summary>The big Mods</summary>

- **Sodium** - The fastest and most compatible rendering optimization mod for Minecraft
- **tweakeroo** - Various client-side tweaks, such as hand restock, hotbar swap/cycle, flexible/fast block placement etc.
- **Iris** - A modern shader pack loader for Minecraft intended to be compatible with existing OptiFine shader packs
- **CraftPresence** - Completely Customize the way others see you play in Discord!
- **Nvidium** - Fast nvidia only rendering engine for sodium (Not updated anymore)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Optifine like feature</summary>

- **Enhanced Block Entities** - Reduce block entity FPS lag with almost no compromises, and improve their visuals
- **Entity Model / Texture Features** - Emissive, Random & Custom texture support for entities in resourcepacks just like Optifine but for Fabric
- **Continuity** - A Fabric mod that allows for efficient connected textures

</details>

<details>
<summary>Amazing Minecraft ResourcePack-Websites</summary>

Customize Minecraft how you want
- **Custom Minecraft Totem** - [https://skinmc.net/totem](https://skinmc.net/totem)
- **Vanilla Tweaks** - [https://vanillatweaks.net/](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
- **Minecraft Darkomizer** - [https://darkomizer.com/](https://darkomizer.com/)
- **Custom XP Colours** - [https://enchanted.games/app/custom-xp/](https://enchanted.games/app/custom-xp/)
- **Custom Outline** - [https://enchanted.games/app/custom-outlines/](https://enchanted.games/app/custom-outlines/)

</details>

***Recommended settings are activated, you can change them but that could cause some problems. 16 chunks should run smooth on every device.***

**!!!Update!!!**
**1.22 update will be puplished as soon as all the mods are released!**
